creator: kbyanc@www2.freedomnet.com
text:
The code is a rewrite of an old DOS utility I wrote 5 years ago (I must say it works much better with unix).
	The video modes are tried and true...I've never seen a VGA adapter/monitor that couldn't work with them.
	I've applied the patches personally to systems running 2.2.5, 2.2.6, and 2.2.7 with no problem...all the changes
	are isolated.

Fix: 

There are 3 patches total, one to syscons.c, one to console.h, and ones to vidcontrol. They are gzipped and 
	on the web at http://www.posi.net/software/public/patch-90col/
